'''ragaya''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:oonopid|oonopid]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-g-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:oonopid|oonopid]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| ragaya
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:rægæyæth|rægæyæth]] || [[word:rægæyæj|rægæyæj]] || [[word:rægæyæsh|rægæyæsh]] || [[word:rægæyæ|rægæyæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:ragagayath|ragagayath]] || [[word:ragagayaj|ragagayaj]] || [[word:ragagayash|ragagayash]] || [[word:ragagaya|ragagaya]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:ragayath|ragayath]] || [[word:ragayaj|ragayaj]] || [[word:ragayash|ragayash]] || [[word:ragaya|ragaya]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:ragafyath|ragafyath]] || [[word:ragafyaj|ragafyaj]] || [[word:ragafyash|ragafyash]] || [[word:ragafyaf|ragafyaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:ragayatha|ragayatha]] || [[word:ragayaja|ragayaja]] || [[word:ragayasha|ragayasha]] || [[word:ragayaka|ragayaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:ragayath|ragayath]] || [[word:ragayaj|ragayaj]] || [[word:ragayash|ragayash]] || [[word:ragaya|ragaya]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:ragayathal|ragayathal]] || [[word:ragayajal|ragayajal]] || [[word:ragayashal|ragayashal]] || [[word:ragayakal|ragayakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:ragayathatha|ragayathatha]] || [[word:ragayajaja|ragayajaja]] || [[word:ragayashasha|ragayashasha]] || [[word:ragayaka|ragayaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:ragayathan|ragayathan]] || [[word:ragayajan|ragayajan]] || [[word:ragayashan|ragayashan]] || [[word:ragayakan|ragayakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:ragayathaoro|ragayathaoro]] || [[word:ragayajaoro|ragayajaoro]] || [[word:ragayashaoro|ragayashaoro]] || [[word:ragayakaoro|ragayakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|88d00a5}}
